_meta.rule: Every api_returns field came from a live API call this session. Code comments are Phase 1. Only live calls are proof.

legend.REAL: Fetcher measures exactly what signal name claims — verified by live API call
legend.PROXY: Fetcher uses substitute indicator — verified what World Bank actually returns vs what signal claims
legend.MIXED: Some indicators match claim, some do not
legend.ENDED: Data source has stopped publishing — dataset complete
legend.BEHIND: Newer data available at source than what we have stored
legend.BLOCKED: API returned 403 or requires key not tested — cannot verify without credentials
legend.RATE_LIMITED: API returned 429 — confirmed alive but could not capture sample this session

indicators.api_returns: Individuals using the Internet (% of population)

cable_disruption.mismatch: Measures internet penetration. Does NOT measure cable cut events or outage incidents.
cable_disruption.action: RENAME to internet_access_proxy or REWIRE to actual cable incident data source.

indicators.api_returns: Container port traffic (TEU: 20 foot equivalent units)

chokepoint.mismatch: Measures trade dependency and port volume. Does NOT measure chokepoint control or strait closure events.
chokepoint.action: RENAME to trade_chokepoint_proxy. Real chokepoint data would require AIS vessel routing analysis.

climate_stress.claims: climate stress (temperature anomaly, drought, extreme weather)

indicators.api_returns: Daily temperature (C) and precipitation data from ERA5 reanalysis

climate_stress.action: CURRENT — API live, no key required, returns actual climate data.

occrp.action: CURRENT — WGI corruption estimate is a direct measure of corruption control.

indicators.api_returns: Official exchange rate (LCU per US$, period average)

currency_collapse.action: CURRENT — actual exchange rate data. YoY depreciation calculation surfaces collapse signal.

cyber_threat.mismatch: Measures number of secure servers — a capacity indicator. Does NOT measure cyber attack events or threat incidents.
cyber_threat.action: RENAME to cyber_infrastructure_proxy. No free global cyber incident database at country level.

indicators.api_returns: Annual freshwater withdrawals, total (% of internal resources)
People using at least basic drinking water services (% of population)

dam_risk.mismatch: Water stress, access, and wealth proxies. Does NOT measure dam structural condition or incident reports.
dam_risk.action: RENAME to water_infrastructure_stress. Global Dam Watch exists for real dam data.

dark_vessel.source: World Bank LPI (fallback — GFW requires GFW_API_KEY not tested)
dark_vessel.mismatch: Logistics survey score. Does NOT measure AIS transponder gaps or dark vessel activity.
dark_vessel.action: REWIRE — add GFW_API_KEY to .env and activate GFW path. Or RENAME to logistics_performance_proxy.

displacement.action: Verify component signals are populated in DB.

indicators.sample: period=2024, value=0.014 MTOE (Aruba sample; real countries higher)

energy_stress.action: BEHIND — EIA has 2024 data. Our fetcher hardcoded end=2023. Update eia_historical.cjs end year to 2025 and re-run.

fao_food.fetcher: food_security_historical.cjs (active). fao_historical.cjs calls FAOSTAT which redirects to HTML — broken.
fao_food.mismatch: Signal claims to measure FAO import dependency ratio. Actually measures undernourishment %. Two different things. fao_historical.cjs is broken (FAOSTAT returns HTML redirect).
fao_food.action: DECISION NEEDED — rename to food_insecurity OR find FAO Food Balance Sheet import dependency data. fao_historical.cjs must be fixed or removed.

food_security.action: ACCEPTABLE — undernourishment, food production, cereal yield, and food import % are legitimate food security measures.

indicators: VIIRS SNPP hotspot detections by country
fire_hotspot.api_test_result: BLOCKED — DEMO_KEY returns 400. Requires real NASA_FIRMS_API_KEY from .env.
fire_hotspot.action: VERIFY with real key. API structure confirmed live.

indicators.api_returns: Air transport, registered carrier departures worldwide

flight_movement.mismatch: Measures passenger and freight volume with YoY drop detection. Does NOT measure actual airspace closures or NOTAM disruption events.
flight_movement.action: PARTIALLY ACCEPTABLE — YoY passenger drop is a real disruption signal. Note: opensky_feed.cjs exists with real AIS data. Consider wiring OpenSky for live disruption detection.

indicators.api_returns: Average precipitation in depth (mm per year)
People using at least basic drinking water services (% of population)
Internally displaced persons, new displacement associated with disasters (Internal Displacement Monitoring Centre)
indicators.sample: Nigeria data available — sparse coverage globally

flood_risk.mismatch: Precipitation is relevant. VC.IDP.NWDP (disaster displacement) is the strongest real measure. Water access and urban % are weak contextual factors.
flood_risk.action: ACCEPTABLE AS MIXED — strengthen with Open-Meteo precipitation and VC.IDP.NWDP as anchor.

capital_flows.source: FRED API St. Louis Fed (requires FRED_API_KEY from .env)

indicators.api_returns: St. Louis Financial Stress Index v4
indicators.api_test_result: BLOCKED — DEMO_KEY returns 400. Requires real FRED_API_KEY from .env.

capital_flows.action: VERIFY with real key. API structure confirmed, series STLFSI4 is the correct financial stress index.

gdelt_conflict.source: GDELT DOC 2.0 API (api.gdeltproject.org — free, no key)
indicators: GDELT CAMEO conflict event codes filtered by country
gdelt_conflict.api_test_result: RATE_LIMITED — API returned 429 (Too Many Requests). Confirmed alive. Could not capture sample this session due to rate limiting.
gdelt_conflict.action: VERIFY on next session with delay between calls. API is live.

gps_jamming.mismatch: Military spending % GDP measures defense budget size. Does NOT measure GPS jamming incidents. gpsjam.org data covers 2021+ only — pre-2021 has no valid source.
gps_jamming.action: SPLIT — accept gpsjam.org data for 2021+ as REAL. Mark pre-2021 as NO_DATA. Remove World Bank military spending as proxy — it measures nothing relevant.

health_crisis.source: WHO GHO API (ghoapi.azureedge.net — free, no key)

indicators.api_returns: Under-5 mortality rate — numeric value with confidence intervals

health_crisis.action: CURRENT — WHO GHO API is live and returning data.

indicators.api_returns: Net lending (+) / borrowing (-) (% of GDP) — government fiscal balance

imf_fiscal.action: CURRENT — IMF DataMapper API live, no key required, returns fiscal balance data.

indicators: BGP routing + active measurement outage scores
internet_shutdown_ioda.api_test_result: TIMEOUT — api.ioda.caida.org timed out on all attempts this session. API structure is correct per fetcher code. May be intermittent or rate-limited.
internet_shutdown_ioda.action: VERIFY on next session. IODA is the correct real source for internet disruption.

indicators.api_returns: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force) (modeled ILO estimate)

iom_displacement.mismatch: Net migration, unemployment, and homicide rate. Does NOT pull from IOM DTM. Signal name 'iom_displacement' implies IOM data. Actual data is World Bank proxies.
iom_displacement.action: REWIRE — iom_dtm_historical.cjs exists and should fetch real IOM data. Investigate why iom_displacement_historical.cjs uses WB instead.

indicators: IOM DTM IDP counts by country and admin area
displacement_idp.api_test_result: BLOCKED — dtm.iom.int/api returns 403 Forbidden. API may now require authentication.
displacement_idp.action: INVESTIGATE — check if IOM DTM changed to require API key. May need to register at dtm.iom.int for API access.

maritime_trade.action: ACCEPTABLE — trade values are legitimate measures of trade activity.

military_proximity.claims: military proximity / troop presence near borders
military_proximity.source: World Bank WDI (SIPRI data routed through WB)
military_proximity.mismatch: Arms imports measures weapons procurement value. Does NOT measure troop positions, deployments, or military proximity to borders.
military_proximity.action: RENAME to arms_imports. No free global troop position database exists.

indicators.api_returns: Daily anomaly counts, confirmed blocks, failure counts per country

ooni_internet.action: CURRENT — OONI API live, returning real censorship measurement data.

pipeline_risk.mismatch: Oil rents, gas rents, and electricity access are economic indicators. Does NOT measure pipeline incidents or infrastructure attacks.
pipeline_risk.action: RENAME to energy_dependence_proxy. Global Energy Monitor has pipeline data but no public API.

indicators.api_returns: Logistics performance index: Quality of trade and transport-related infrastructure (1=low to 5=high)
Liner shipping connectivity index (maximum value in 2004 = 100)

port_congestion.mismatch: LPI is a survey score 1-5. Liner connectivity measures shipping route coverage. Neither measures actual port dwell times or congestion events.
port_congestion.action: RENAME to logistics_performance_proxy. Real port dwell data requires MarineTraffic (paid).

indicators.api_returns: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force) (modeled ILO estimate)

prediction_market.mismatch: Economic fundamentals (GDP, unemployment, inflation, spending). Does NOT measure prediction market probabilities from Metaculus, Polymarket, or similar.
prediction_market.action: RENAME to economic_fundamentals_proxy. Economic indicators are defensible but name is completely misleading.

rail_corridor.mismatch: Rail infrastructure quantity and freight volume. Does NOT measure rail disruption events or corridor closures.
rail_corridor.action: RENAME to rail_infrastructure_proxy. No free global rail incident database exists.

indicators.api_returns: Total natural resources rents (% of GDP)

resource_conflict.mismatch: Economic dependence on resource rents. Does NOT measure resource-driven conflict events.
resource_conflict.action: RENAME to resource_dependence. UCDP GED could be filtered for resource conflicts but requires additional classification work.

seismic_risk.source: USGS Earthquake Catalog (earthquake.usgs.gov — free, no key)

indicators.api_returns: Earthquake events: place, magnitude, time, depth, coordinates
indicators.sample: 87 km NE of Nanortalik, Greenland — mag=4.3 — 2023-01-07

seismic_risk.action: CURRENT — USGS API live, returns actual seismic events.

social_volume.claims: social unrest / social media volume signal

indicators.api_returns: Unemployment, total (% of total labor force) (modeled ILO estimate)

social_volume.mismatch: Unemployment, inequality, homicide rate, population growth are structural stress factors. Does NOT measure social media volume, protest events, or unrest incidents.
social_volume.action: RENAME to social_stress_proxy. Indicators are defensible as unrest risk factors.

sovereign_cds.claims: sovereign CDS spread (credit default swap market price)

indicators.api_returns: Central government debt, total (% of GDP)
Total reserves in months of imports

sovereign_cds.mismatch: Fiscal fundamentals — debt service, government debt, current account, reserves. Does NOT measure actual CDS spread prices from credit markets.
sovereign_cds.action: RENAME to fiscal_credit_risk. Indicators are defensible credit risk proxies but name implies live market data.

structural_pressure.source: Composite of 5 signals: iom_displacement, social_volume, prediction_market, food_security, usda_food
structural_pressure.action: Freshness and accuracy depend on components — see individual verdicts above. Some components are proxies.

tor_censorship.source: Tor Project Metrics (metrics.torproject.org — free, no key)

indicators.api_returns: CSV: date, country, users, lower, upper, frac — Tor relay user estimates by country
indicators.sample: 2023-01-01: ae=4030 users, af=411 users, al=2426 users

tor_censorship.action: CURRENT — Tor Metrics CSV endpoint live. NOTE: JSON endpoint returns 404 but CSV endpoint works. Fetcher uses CSV correctly.

indicators.api_returns: CSV: country, year, type_of_violence, deaths_a, deaths_b, deaths_civilians, deaths_unknown
indicators.sample: ged251-csv.zip HTTP 200 — Last-Modified: Wed 11 Jun 2025 — 29,307,888 bytes

conflict.action: BEHIND — fetcher hardcoded to ged241-csv.zip (v24.1). GED v25.1 (ged251-csv.zip) published Jun 2025. Update URL in ucdp_historical.cjs and re-run.

displacement_unhcr.source: UNHCR Population API (api.unhcr.org — free, no key)

indicators.api_returns: Population counts: refugees, asylum_seekers, returned_refugees, idps, returned_idps, stateless, ooc, oip, hst

displacement_unhcr.action: CURRENT — UNHCR API live, returns actual displacement counts.

unhcr_odp.mismatch: Net migration and homicide rate. Does NOT pull UNHCR origin/destination refugee data. Signal name is completely misleading — UNHCR ODP API exists at api.unhcr.org.
unhcr_odp.action: REWIRE — wire to UNHCR Population API (verified live above). Or merge with displacement_unhcr signal.

usda_food.claims: USDA food production and supply data
indicators: USDA PSD commodity production, domestic consumption, exports, imports
usda_food.api_test_result: World Bank WDI — live, no key required

vdem_governance.source: V-Dem v14 — STATIC EMBEDDED dataset (no live API call)

indicators.api_returns: STATIC — data hardcoded from V-Dem v14 inside fetcher file
indicators.note: Not an API — data embedded in code

vdem_governance.action: STATIC — will not update until V-Dem v15 released and fetcher manually updated. Data is real V-Dem v14 LDI.

indicators.api_returns: Annual freshwater withdrawals, total (% of internal resources)

indicators: TIES sanctions cases: sender, target, cost severity, multilateral flag
sanctions_pressure.api_test_result: STATIC dataset — no live API. Coverage 1945-2005.
sanctions_pressure.action: ENDED — TIES v4.1 ends 2005. No v5 published. Mark as historical-complete.

indicators: NELDA election violence indicators: pre-election violence, fraud, protesters killed
election_calendar.api_test_result: STATIC dataset — no live API. Coverage 1945-2020.
election_calendar.action: ENDED — NELDA v6 ends 2020. No v7 announced. Mark as historical-complete.

_verified_summary.note: social_unrest (ACLED) excluded — decommissioned before this session, not a historical fetcher
_verified_summary.live_api_calls_made: All indicators called live this session except those marked BLOCKED
